pi_items.source: task.json metadata specification. This is a synthetic test URL with valid format (HTTPS URL with /geoserver suffix matching GeoServer convention). Default value from setup_task.sh is empty string.

task.json metadata. GeoServer REST API property 'numDecimals'. Setup script confirms default is 8 (line 20 of setup_task.sh). Task expects value of 6, which is a valid integer within GeoServer's supported range.

task.json metadata. GeoServer REST API property 'verbose' (boolean). Setup script shows default is false (line 21 of setup_task.sh). Task expects true. GeoServer 2.25.x documentation confirms verbose controls pretty-printing/formatting of XML output.

task.json metadata. GeoServer REST API property 'charset'. Setup script confirms UTF-8 is the default (line 23 of setup_task.sh). GeoServer 2.25.x documentation confirms UTF-8 is the standard and recommended character encoding.

GeoServer 2.25.x documentation confirms PRODUCTION_LOGGING is a built-in logging profile. Verified through official GeoServer logging configuration documentation which lists available profiles: DEFAULT_LOGGING, GEOSERVER_DEVELOPER_LOGGING, GEOTOOLS_DEVELOPER_LOGGING, PRODUCTION_LOGGING, QUIET_LOGGING, VERBOSE_LOGGING.

task.json metadata specification. This is a synthetic test organization name for the contact information field. Setup script shows default is 'Default Organization' (line 42 of setup_task.sh). Task-specific value.
task.json metadata specification. This is a synthetic test contact person name. Setup script shows default is 'Default Contact' (line 41 of setup_task.sh). Task-specific value.
task.json metadata and verified in export_result.sh (line 33). Path points to /home/ga/ which is the home directory of user 'ga' configured in env.json (lines 34-50). Valid path in the environment.

privileged_info_summary: The configure_global_settings task targets GeoServer 2.25.2 running in Docker (kartoza/geoserver image). All metadata claims are verified: expected_proxy_url is a valid HTTPS URL following GeoServer conventions; expected_decimals is 6 (versus default 8); expected_verbose is true (versus default false); expected_charset is UTF-8 (matches default); expected_logging_profile is PRODUCTION_LOGGING, a built-in GeoServer logging profile; expected contact organization and person are synthetic values; report_path is /home/ga/global_settings_report.txt, a valid path. The task uses real Natural Earth geospatial data (countries, populated places, rivers, lakes at 1:110m scale) imported into PostGIS, but the configuration values themselves are synthetic test expectations, not extracted from real data sources.
